task_completion.description: Open OpenRocket and load the initial cg_optimization.ork design
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is open and the window title or component tree indicates that 'cg_optimization.ork' is loaded.
The 'Motor configuration' tab in OpenRocket shows the 'Aerotech K550W' (or K550) motor assigned to the rocket's motor mount.

task_completion.description: Reposition both Main and Drouge parachutes at least 150mm forward
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component configuration windows for the 'Main parachute' and 'Drouge parachute' show their position values adjusted forward (closer to the nose) by at least 15cm/150mm, or the 2D rocket diagram visually shows both parachutes moved significantly higher up the body tube.

task_completion.description: Verify flight performance with a simulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab shows a completed simulation run with the new K550W motor, displaying calculated metrics like Apogee and Stability.

task_completion.description: Save the optimized design to cg_optimized.ork
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager shows the file 'cg_optimized.ork' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Document the motor, stability margins, and apogee in a report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'cg_optimization_report.txt' in the exports folder. The text must include the motor used (K550W), before and after stability margins, and the final simulated apogee.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenRocket graphical interface (motor selection, component editing, simulation tabs) rather than directly editing the XML .ork file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not add new mass components or modify structural dimensions
integrity.visual_evidence: The component tree in OpenRocket does not show any newly added mass components. The dimensions of the fins, body tubes, and nose cone remain visually unchanged in the rocket diagram.

integrity.description: Report data matches the simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: The stability margins and apogee values typed into the text report match the actual numbers displayed in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target motor: Aerotech K550W (K550). Required parachute shift: at least 150mm (0.145m threshold) forward toward the nose for both Main and Drouge parachutes. Output ORK path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/cg_optimized.ork. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/cg_optimization_report.txt. The report must contain the motor name, before/after stability margins, and final simulated apogee.
